description: Our skilled roofing team combines years of experience, expert craftsmanship, and genuine commitment to protect every home with lasting quality.

rodger.title: Rodger D. Struck
rodger.intro: Rodger oversees every roof we build, reviewing plans, materials and workmanship at each stage so the finished product always matches the standard that built our reputation.

marcus.title: Marcus J. Hale
marcus.intro: Marcus runs each project on site, coordinating crews, schedules and deliveries so every job moves smoothly from the first tear off to the final walkthrough.

devin.title: Devin T. Cole
devin.intro: Devin inspects every roof for defects before we call it done, walking each slope and seam with a checklist that leaves no shingle, joint or seal unexamined.

travis.title: Travis L. Boone
travis.intro: Travis keeps every job site safe, enforcing harness rules, ladder checks and clean work zones so our crews and your property stay protected from day one.

elena.title: Elena M. Vargas
elena.intro: Elena manages operations across all projects, aligning permits, suppliers and timelines behind the scenes so every crew arrives with what it needs, exactly when it needs it.

caleb.title: Caleb R. Foster
caleb.intro: Caleb leads the crew on site, setting the pace and the standard, mentoring newer roofers and making sure every course of shingles goes down straight and sealed.
